metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5540
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, S1: TM2-2/3-TM3 domain of SCAMP5 directly interacts with the C-terminal region of NHE6 (SLC9A6)

Figure 2, S2: Confocal imaging of immunolabeled NHE6 showed overlap with synaptophysin (SYP), VAMP2 and SCAMP5 in cultured rat hippocampal neurons with NHE6 and SCAMP5.. Experimental description: "To check the subcellular localization of both proteins, we cotransfected cultured rat hippocampal neurons with NHE6 and SCAMP5 together with synaptophysin (SYP), an SV marker, and found that their expression patterns overlapped with that of synaptophysin (Fig. 2A)."

"The expression of endogenous NHE6 also substantially overlapped with that of vesicle-associated membrane protein 2 (VAMP2) (SI Appendix, Fig. S1 E and F)."

"The full-length construct of human NHE6 cDNA which contains a triple HA (3XHA) tag in the first predicted extracellular loop and mCherry tag at C-terminal region of the cytoplasmic tail was kindly provided by Dr. Rajini Rao (Johns Hopkins University)."
